key_outputs.strongest_attack: SRA ablation: sparsemax is a one-line change in SRA
key_outputs.rebuttal_strength: STRONG — operator range difference (open vs closed simplex), 3 distinct testable predictions (H1, H4, H3)

summary: Adversarial search complete. 5 attacks, 0 kill signals. Strongest attack (SRA-ablation) rebutted with strong mathematical differential: sparsemax changes operator range from open to closed simplex, creating structurally different faithfulness guarantee. Verdict: novelty CLEAR, recommendation PROCEED.
critical_context: Strongest attack: sparsemax=ablation of SRA. REBUTTED: range(sparsemax)=closed simplex, range(softmax)=open simplex — qualitative not quantitative difference
3 distinct testable predictions distinguish from SRA: H1 (comprehensiveness), H4 (adversarial swap KL), H3 (head selection + probe)
No survey names sparsemax+HSD as a variant; no prior paper fills the Method×Task gap
Verdict for Gate N1: CLEAR/PROCEED/HIGH confidence
